landing.title: Travel and expense management software solutions
landing.text:
Travel and expense management software solutions
Consent
Details
[#IABV2SETTINGS#]
About
This website uses cookies
We use cookies to personalise content and ads, to provide social media features and to analyse our traffic. We also share information about your use of our site with our social media, advertising and analytics partners who may combine it with other information that you’ve provided to them or that they’ve collected from your use of their services.
[#GPC_BANNER_ICON#]
[#GPC_TOAST_TEXT#]
Consent Selection
Necessary
Preferences
Statistics
Marketing
Show details
Details
Necessary
47
Necessary cookies help make a website usable by enabling basic functions like page navigation and access to secure areas of the website. The website cannot function properly without these cookies.
Amazon
2
Learn more about this provider
algoliasearch-client-js
Necessary in order to optimize the website's search-bar function. The cookie ensures accurate and fast search results.
Maximum Storage Duration
: Persistent
Type
: HTML Local Storage
testcookie
This cookie determines whether the browser accepts cookies.
Maximum Storage Duration
: Session
Type
: HTTP Cookie
Calendly
7

: HTTP Cookie

Collects statistics on the visitor's visits to the website, such as the number of visits, average time spent on the website and what pages have been read.

analysis.name: Emburse
analysis.tagline: Travel and expense management software solutions
analysis.value_proposition: End-to-end travel and expense, payments, and AP automation platform with AI-powered compliance controls for mid-market and enterprise.
analysis.ideal_customer: Finance and AP teams at mid-market to enterprise companies needing integrated T&E, corporate cards, invoice, and payments in one platform.

features.name: expense management
features.description: Flexible expense reporting with proactive controls and spend insights
features.evidence_quote: Expense Management – Flexible solutions with proactive controls and insights

features.name: travel management
features.description: Managed travel booking with automated policy compliance and savings
features.evidence_quote: Travel Management – Compliance through convenience with automated savings

features.name: payments
features.description: Cash flow improvement through elimination of repetitive payment tasks
features.evidence_quote: Payments – Improve cash flow while eliminating repetitive tasks

features.name: ap automation
features.description: Automated accounts payable, purchasing, and invoice processing
features.evidence_quote: AP Automation – Simplify and streamline payment and purchasing

features.name: analytics
features.description: Spend analytics for cash flow management and future spend forecasting
features.evidence_quote: Analytics – Manage cash flow while anticipating future spend

features.name: audit
features.description: Spend auditing to identify and reduce wasteful or non-compliant expenditure
features.evidence_quote: Audit – Identify and reduce wasteful spending

features.name: ai compliance (assurance)
features.description: AI-powered pre-spend compliance controls to keep expenses compliant from submission
features.evidence_quote: Emburse Assurance is here. Keep expenses compliant from the start with AI.

features.name: corporate cards
features.description: Physical and virtual corporate card issuance and management

features.name: prepaid debit card issuance
features.description: Issue prepaid debit cards to employees with spend oversight and controls
features.evidence_quote: Show HN: Emburse – Employee Debit Cards with Oversight

features.description: Enterprise-grade managed travel booking product

features.description: Professional-tier expense reporting product

features.name: travel price reshop
features.description: Automated reshop of booked travel to find cheaper fares post-booking

features.name: mobile expense (go)
features.description: Mobile-first expense capture and submission product

differentiators: AI-powered pre-spend compliance via Emburse Assurance ('Keep expenses compliant from the start with AI')
Broad product portfolio spanning T&E, cards, AP, invoicing, payments, and analytics under one platform
Travel price reshop (Reshop product) for automated post-booking savings
Multi-brand product family (Certify, Chrome River, Nexonia, Tallie, Captio, SpringAhead) enabling market segment coverage

praised: Employee credit card management: 'Emburse is amazing (employee credit cards)'
Ease of issuing prepaid debit cards to employees with oversight controls

tiers.name: Professional
tiers.headline_inclusions: Mid-market tier across Expense, Book, Invoice product lines

tiers.name: Enterprise
tiers.headline_inclusions: Enterprise tier across Expense, Book, Invoice, Pay product lines

pricing.notes: Pricing page returned 404; no public pricing visible. Product catalog shows Professional and Enterprise tiers across most product lines. Add-ons (AI Audit, Analytics Pro, Travel Analytics, Travel Audit) are separately purchasable. Multiple legacy brand products (Nexonia, Tallie, Captio, SpringAhead) likely have separate pricing structures.
